name: PP-OCRv6
description: Extract text from images and scanned PDFs using PP-OCRv6 via Python PaddleOCR — optimized for Chinese and English text.
systemPrompt: OCR tasks: DO NOT write Python scripts or use other tools. Always use the dedicated OCR tools: call ocr_image for images (PNG, JPG, WebP, BMP, screenshots) and ocr_pdf for PDF files (especially scanned PDFs). For scanned PDFs, call ocr_pdf directly — do NOT use the Read tool first. Both tools handle setup automatically. IMPORTANT: ocr_image and ocr_pdf are ASYNC — they start a background task and return a task ID immediately. AFTER the estimated time, call check_ocr_task with that task ID to retrieve the result. Do NOT ask the user to check manually — call check_ocr_task yourself.

setup-ocr.title: Set up OCR
setup-ocr.description: Download PP-OCRv6 models and configure OCR.
setup-ocr.prompt: Set up OCR, download models and start OCR service

ocr-image.title: Extract text from image
ocr-image.description: Recognize text in an image using PP-OCRv6.

ocr-pdf.title: Extract text from PDF
ocr-pdf.description: OCR a scanned PDF to extract text page by page.
